generalities.text: [Ear] Hardness of hearing; tinnitus. Eustachian catarrh (Hydr; Merc dulc)

keynotes.text: color="#800000">ROSA DAMASCENA Damask Rose Useful in the beginning of hay-fever, with involvement of Eustachian tube.

Farrington mentions that R. dam. was introduced by Jeanes as a remedy at the beginning of rose-cold when the Eustachian tube is involved, with some degree of deafness and tinnitus. Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main
